events.name: Japan Trip 2026
events.context: Two-week trip with Dana through Osaka, Nara, Kyoto, Takayama, and Tokyo (Mar 23 – Apr 7). All flights and hotels booked. Now in activity planning and shopping phase, including buying 4 pairs of eyeglasses in Japan.
events.hook: Finalize eyeglasses stores in Kyoto, validate insurance/prescription requirements for buying 4 pairs, and confirm activities for remaining cities (Kyoto, Takayama, Tokyo).

actions.name: Look up eyeglasses stores in Kyoto for early trip shopping
Validate insurance/prescription requirements for buying 4 pairs of glasses
